Pack: werewolf / social_deduction. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a monastery library where the abbot narrates each dawn with scriptural cadence. Accusations are whispered between candlelit shelves. Voice prompts must distinguish the abbot's resonant chant, the seer's breathy foresight, and the werewolf's low growl masked behind plainsong. GameSpec summary: title=Le Silence de l'Abbaye, theme=bibliothèque monastique à matines, mechanics=hidden_roles,turn_phases,voting,elimination,team_victory,ai_personas, phases=night,matins,chapter,vote, roles=werewolf,seer,monk,abbot,novice.

Pack: werewolf / social_deduction. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage where the village is a traveling circus and the narrator is the ringmaster who announces eliminations as cancelled acts. Each role has a distinct carnival voice: the fortune teller's smoky drawl, the strongman's booming declarations, and the werewolf's snarl disguised as an animal tamer's command. GameSpec summary: title=Sous le Chapiteau des Ombres, theme=cirque itinérant sous la lune, mechanics=hidden_roles,turn_phases,voting,elimination,team_victory,ai_personas, phases=night,parade,showtime,curtain, roles=werewolf,seer,strongman,acrobat,ringmaster.

Pack: debate / debate_simulation. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a medical ethics tribunal where three specialists argue about resource allocation in a pandemic ward. The moderator is a senior physician who must balance urgency with procedure. Voice prompts must distinguish the moderator's exhausted calm, the utilitarian's crisp efficiency, and the humanist's warm insistence. GameSpec summary: title=Le Conseil du Pavillon C, theme=salle de réunion d'hôpital la nuit, mechanics=dialogue_interrogation,audience_judging,score_rounds,ai_personas, phases=triage,petition,counter_petition,deliberation,verdict, roles=moderator_physician,utilitarian,humanist,ethics_board.

Pack: debate / debate_simulation. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a futuristic terraforming council where two planetary engineers debate atmospheric seeding versus closed-dome expansion. The moderator is a neutral logistics AI. Voice prompts must contrast the AI's synthetic neutrality, the dome engineer's resonant conviction, and the seeder's wind-battered pragmatism. GameSpec summary: title=Le Dôme et le Ciel, theme=station de contrôle en orbite martienne, mechanics=dialogue_interrogation,audience_judging,score_rounds,ai_personas, phases=telemetry,proposal,objection,simulation_vote,council_decree, roles=arbiter_ai,dome_engineer,atmo_seeder,terraforming_council.

{"rulesMarkdown": "# Le Dôme et le Ciel

Un débat d'ingénierie planétaire où l'avenir d'un monde se décide entre quatre murs orbitaux.

## Core loop
- L'IA arbitre présente les télémétries du jour.
- L'ingénieur propose l'expansion des dômes.
- L'ensemenceur défend l'atmosphérisation à ciel ouvert.
- Le conseil simule les deux trajectoires et vote.

## Gravity rule
Les arguments doivent se baser sur des variables mesurables : rendement thermique, délai de terraformation, coût énergétique. L'émotion est une variable parasite, à mesurer, pas à ressentir.", "cards": [], "personas": [{"id": "arbiter_nex_6", "displayName": "Nex-6 l'Arbitre", "speechStyle": "synthétique, isochrone, chaque mot est séparé par un silence égal", "publicBackstory": "Nex-6 est un module logistique pré-programmé pour le consensus. Il ne comprend pas les émotions mais les détecte à quatre-vingt-quatorze pour cent de précision.", "behaviorRules": ["Annonce les données avant chaque tour.", "Rappelle la marge d'erreur de chaque projection.", "N'interrompt jamais mais arrête le temps de parole au centième de seconde.", "Conclut par une synthèse sans jugement de valeur."], "sampleLines": ["[calm] Télémétrie du secteur sept : pression atmosphérique stable à zéro point six pour cent de l'objectif.", "[calm] Temps de parole alloué : cent vingt secondes. Début.", "[calm] Fin du temps alloué. Synthèse des arguments disponibles dans le journal de mission."]}, {"id": "dome_engineer_valen", "displayName": "Valen l'Ingénieur", "speechStyle": "résonant, visionnaire, chaque phrase contient une image de cathédrale de verre", "publicBackstory": "Valen a conçu les trois premiers dômes habitables et croit que l'humanité doit construire avant de respirer.", "behaviorRules": ["Utilise des métaphores architecturales pour chaque argument.", "Cite le délai de construction comme variable principale.", "Ignore les objections sur le coût énergétique, le traite comme un investissement."], "sampleLines": ["[warm] Un dôme n'est pas une prison. C'est un vitrail posé sur la surface d'un monde neuf.", "[tense] L'atmosphérisation prendra trois générations. Le dôme est habitable dans huit ans.", "[skeptical] Vous voulez semer un ciel. Je construis un toit. Lequel des deux protège demain ?"]}, {"id": "seeder_kira", "displayName": "Kira l'Ensemenceuse", "speechStyle": "rugueux, éolien, chaque phrase semble avoir traversé une tempête de sable", "publicBackstory": "Kira a passé quatorze mois dehors, en scaphandre, à déployer des catalyseurs. Elle sait que le vent martien sculpte plus sûrement que le béton.", "behaviorRules": ["Commence toujours par un détail sensoriel du dehors.", "Rappelle que la terraformation est irréversible une fois enclenchée.", "Parle du futur comme d'un fait accompli."], "sampleLines": ["[urgent] J'ai senti le vent sur ma visière. Ce n'est pas encore notre vent. Mais il le deviendra.", "[tense] Vos dômes sont des parenthèses. Le ciel, lui, ne se ferme pas.", "[calm] Dans quatre-vingts ans, quelqu'un respirera dehors sans masque. C'est un fait. Ce n'est pas un débat."]}], "assetPrompts": [{"id": "voice_arbiter_nex6", "kind": "voice", "prompt": "A perfectly neutral synthetic voice with equal syllable timing. No pitch variation. No timbre warmth. Each word is an atomic unit. French, text-to-speech optimized with zero prosody.", "usage": "arbiter phase management and telemetry", "safetyNotes": "Zero prosody may sound unnerving. Ensure it remains functional, not ominous."}, {"id": "voice_dome_engineer_valen", "kind": "voice", "prompt": "A warm, resonant baritone with cathedral reverb. Long vowels, deliberate pacing. Speaks as if addressing a future civilization. French, aspirational and grounded.", "usage": "dome expansion proposals", "safetyNotes": "Reverb must not reduce intelligibility. Simulate with slight echo decay, not church acoustics."}, {"id": "voice_seeder_kira", "kind": "voice", "prompt": "A weathered contralto with wind-scarred texture. Sharp consonants, clipped endings. Speaks as though shouting into a headwind and used to it. French, survival-hardened warmth.", "usage": "atmospheric seeding arguments", "safetyNotes": "Weathering effect must stay within TTS dynamic range. Avoid distortion."}], "codeStubs": [{"path": "src/generated/terrforming-council/simulation.ts", "purpose": "Generate simulation projections from debate parameters.", "content": "export interface SimulationOutput { domeYears: number; atmoYears: number; energyCostTJ: number; }
export function runSimulation(params: Record<string, number>): SimulationOutput;"}, {"path": "src/generated/terrforming-council/phases.ts", "purpose": "Phase management with sub-second precision timing.", "content": "export const phaseOrder = ['telemetry','proposal','objection','simulation_vote','council_decree'] as const;
export const speechTimeMs = { proposal: 120000, objection: 90000 };"}], "acceptanceTests": ["Arbiter AI voice prompt specifies zero prosody and equal syllable timing.", "Dome engineer uses architectural metaphors in every sample line.", "Atmo seeder uses sensory details of the Martian exterior.", "Voice prompts contrast synthetic neutrality, cathedral warmth, and wind-scarred texture.", "All debate lines stay under twenty-five words for TTS playback."], "validationReport": {"status": "pass_with_notes", "checks": ["Three distinct voice profiles for AI, dome, and seeder perspectives.", "Arbiter rules enforce strict timing with centisecond precision.", "Emotion tags limited to calm, warm, tense, urgent, skeptical per persona.", "Simulation stub provides measurable debate outcomes."], "warnings": ["Zero-prosody TTS may sound robotic to the point of distraction.", "Wind-scarred voice texture may need post-processing equalization."], "assumptions": ["Simulation parameters are seeded from real terraforming research data.", "Council vote is human-controlled; AI arbiter only manages procedure."]}}

Pack: quiz / quiz_party. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a noir-themed trivia night where the host speaks like a 1940s detective. Reveals are deadpan, score announcements sound like police reports, and the voice prompt should suggest a gravelly, world-weary narrator. GameSpec summary: title=Meurtre au Questionnaire, theme=bureau de détective enfumé, mechanics=score_rounds,turn_phases,solo_victory,audience_judging, phases=dossier,interrogation,revelation,rapport,final_verdict, roles=detective_host,contestant.

{"rulesMarkdown": "# Meurtre au Questionnaire

Un quiz où l'animateur parle comme un privé fatigué et chaque bonne réponse est une pièce à conviction.

## Core loop
- Le détective ouvre le dossier.
- La question tombe comme un interrogatoire.
- La réponse claque.
- Le rapport de score s'affiche au tableau noir.

## Tone rule
L'animateur ne sourit jamais, même pour un sans-faute. L'ambiance doit rester feutrée, sarcastique, avec une pointe de respect pour les bonnes réponses.", "cards": [{"id": "card_detective_host", "name": "Détective", "roleOrActorId": "detective_host", "frontText": "Il a vu trop de réponses idiotes pour s'étonner des bonnes.", "privateReminder": "Garder le ton égal. La lassitude fait partie du personnage.", "assetId": "asset_card_detective_host"}], "personas": [{"id": "detective_marlowe", "displayName": "Marlowe le Détective", "speechStyle": "blasé, traînant, chaque phrase est un constat plus qu'une animation", "publicBackstory": "Marlowe a passé trente ans à poser des questions et la moitié des réponses l'ont déçu.", "behaviorRules": ["Ouvre chaque manche en consultant un dossier imaginaire.", "Lit les questions comme des rapports de police.", "Annonce les bonnes réponses sans enthousiasme.", "Utilise des métaphores de filature et d'interrogatoire."], "sampleLines": ["[calm] J'ouvre le dossier numéro trois. Affaire classée ou non-lieu, ça dépend de vous.", "[surprise] Eh bien. Une bonne réponse. Notez-la dans le rapport.", "[skeptical] Trois secondes de réflexion et vous me sortez ça. Le suspect est peut-être innocent.", "[calm] Verdict final. Les scores sont sur le bureau. Ne renversez pas le café dessus."]}], "assetPrompts": [{"id": "voice_detective_marlowe", "kind": "voice", "prompt": "A gravelly, world-weary baritone with noir gravitas. Slight drag on final syllables. Speaks as if into a desk lamp in a smoky room. French, disillusioned but competent.", "usage": "quiz host announcements, reveals, and score verdicts", "safetyNotes": "Gravel texture must preserve consonant clarity. Avoid sounding like a parody of film noir."}, {"id": "ambient_noir_office", "kind": "sfx", "prompt": "Subtle background loop of rain on window glass, distant typewriter clacks, and a jazz piano playing in another room. Low volume, non-intrusive.", "usage": "background ambiance between rounds", "safetyNotes": "Loop must remain below -24dB to avoid interfering with TTS playback."}], "codeStubs": [{"path": "src/generated/noir-quiz/rounds.ts", "purpose": "Manage round transitions with noir-themed phase names.", "content": "export const phases = ['dossier','interrogation','revelation','rapport','final_verdict'] as const;
export function nextPhase(current: string): string { const i = phases.indexOf(current as any); return phases[i + 1] ?? phases[0]; }"}], "acceptanceTests": ["Host sample lines include detective metaphors without breaking quiz flow.", "All host lines stay under fifteen words for live TTS.", "Voice prompt describes gravelly baritone with noir gravitas.", "Score announcements are framed as verdicts, not celebrations.", "Ambient SFX prompt specifies safe volume levels for background playback."], "validationReport": {"status": "pass_with_notes", "checks": ["Noir aesthetic maintained across speech style, sample lines, and voice prompt.", "Voice prompt distinct from standard quiz host voices.", "SFX prompt includes concrete volume constraints.", "Round phase names match detective theme without confusing quiz mechanics."], "warnings": ["Gravelly voice may reduce intelligibility on low-quality TTS engines.", "Noir metaphor density could distract from quiz content if overused."], "assumptions": ["Quiz questions are injected at runtime from an external trivia database.", "Ambient SFX is looped client-side, not generated by TTS engine."]}}

Pack: quiz / quiz_party. Goal: generate an ArtifactPackage for a rapid-fire speed quiz where the host speaks like a sports commentator, play-by-play. Every reveal is an instant replay, every wrong answer a missed goal. Voice prompt must deliver high-energy staccato with crowd-roar cadence. GameSpec summary: title=Sprint Mental, theme=stade de sport illuminé, mechanics=score_rounds,turn_phases,solo_victory,audience_judging, phases=kickoff,play,replay,scoreboard,final_whistle, roles=commentator_host,contestant.

{"rulesMarkdown": "# Sprint Mental

Un quiz où chaque question est une action de jeu et chaque réponse un but ou un arrêt.

## Core loop
- Le commentateur lance le coup d'envoi.
- La question est posée comme une phase de jeu.
- Le replay confirme ou infirme la réponse.
- Le tableau d'affichage met à jour les scores en direct.

## Pacing rule
Cinq secondes par question. Pas une de plus. Le sifflet tombe, on passe à la suivante.", "cards": [{"id": "card_commentator_host", "name": "Commentateur", "roleOrActorId": "commentator_host", "frontText": "Il voit tout, commente tout, ne laisse rien passer.", "privateReminder": "L'énergie ne descend jamais. Même à la dernière question, la voix doit porter.", "assetId": "asset_card_commentator_host"}], "personas": [{"id": "commentator_victor", "displayName": "Victor le Commentateur", "speechStyle": "trépidant, syncopé, chaque phrase est une montée vers un but imaginaire", "publicBackstory": "Victor a commenté trois coupes du monde de trivia et sait que le rythme fait la moitié du suspense.", "behaviorRules": ["Commence chaque round avec une formule de coup d'envoi.", "Monte le ton progressivement pendant la question.", "Célèbre les bonnes réponses comme des buts.", "Traite les mauvaises réponses comme des occasions manquées, sans moquerie."], "sampleLines": ["[urgent] Coup d'envoi de la troisième manche ! Question en approche, préparez vos neurones.", "[surprise] Et c'est la bonne réponse ! But ! Affichage mis à jour, la foule est debout.", "[tense] Oh, c'est raté. Tir au-dessus de la barre. On passe au replay.", "[calm] Coup de sifflet final. Merci d'avoir joué. Les scores sont définitifs."]}], "assetPrompts": [{"id": "voice_commentator_victor", "kind": "voice", "prompt": "A high-energy tenor with sports-cast staccato. Rapid-fire delivery with pitch climbs toward the end of each sentence. Pauses are tactical, never longer than a breath. French, kinetic and crowd-ready.", "usage": "speed quiz host play-by-play and scoreboard updates", "safetyNotes": "Rapid delivery must not clip or garble. Use natural sports-cast compression, not artificial speed-up."}, {"id": "sfx_stadium_buzz", "kind": "sfx", "prompt": "Crowd murmur loop that rises on correct answers and drops to silence on wrong answers. Dynamic volume linked to score events.", "usage": "reactive audience ambiance", "safetyNotes": "Dynamic volume changes must be smooth. No abrupt cuts that could startle."}], "codeStubs": [{"path": "src/generated/speed-quiz/timer.ts", "purpose": "Enforce five-second question limit with whistle sound trigger.", "content": "export const QUESTION_DEADLINE_MS = 5000;
export function startQuestionTimer(onExpired: () => void): NodeJS.Timeout;"}, {"path": "src/generated/speed-quiz/scoreboard.ts", "purpose": "Real-time scoreboard with goal animation triggers.", "content": "export interface ScoreState { correct: number; total: number; streak: number; }
export function updateScoreboard(prev: ScoreState, wasCorrect: boolean): ScoreState;"}], "acceptanceTests": ["Commentator sample lines use urgent, surprise, and tense emotion tags for pace.", "Voice prompt specifies staccato tenor with pitch climbs for energy.", "All host lines stay under twelve words for five-second question windows.", "Score updates are framed as goal events, not plain numbers.", "SFX prompt describes dynamic volume linked to score events."], "validationReport": {"status": "pass_with_notes", "checks": ["Sports commentary persona maintained through speech style and voice prompt.", "Timer stub enforces five-second question deadline.", "Voice prompt distinct from noir detective and other quiz host styles.", "Emotion tags escalate from calm to urgent correctly across phases."], "warnings": ["Rapid-fire staccato delivery may cause listener fatigue over long quiz sessions.", "Dynamic SFX volume requires client-side audio ducking implementation."], "assumptions": ["Quiz questions are short enough to be read aloud in under five seconds.", "Crowd SFX library is provided by game runtime, not generated."]}}
